summary: Classified the five hydrated open PRs independently as a live inventory shard. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive item was detected, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed by this job. Four PRs should remain open as independent work; the maintainer-owned draft PR needs maintainer review before any lifecycle action.
